segments.text: Who is going to build India's first hundred billion dollar global company?
So, Ben Koslav was asked this and he thinks it could be anyone watching this
right now. We've already proved we can build for India. UPI now handles over [music] 21 billion transactions a month.
Adhar is literally the world's largest biometric identification system. [music]
We have proved we can build for 1.4 billion people. But building for the world should be our next goal. And you know, people have already started. So on
my LinkedIn timeline, I [music] have literally come across so many folks who are building tools to solve real world problems. [music] And all of this is
through one platform emergent, not experiments or prototypes. I am talking about actual businesses running on apps that people built themselves without
knowing how to code. So you could launch a tool that caps doom scrolling or a carpool app designed for women's safety.
Even an app that tracks every pending payment [music] for your business. If you are a student, make that tool your college needs. If you run a business,
ship the dashboard you have been wishing existed. The barrier is gone now. So go check out Emergent.
